name: Eastman Kodak Company
description: Eastman Kodak Company is a leading global manufacturer focused on commercial print and advanced materials and chemicals. With a rich history spanning over 130 years and a portfolio of 79,000 worldwide patents, the company leverages its expertise in technology and science to provide innovative solutions for the printing and materials industries. Headquartered in Rochester, New York, Kodak continues to evolve its business model to support customers in the commercial print, packaging, and functional printing sectors, maintaining its commitment to enhancing what the world sees and creates through advanced imaging and chemical technologies.
